creator: dominique.c.michel@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #1)

Maybe. I just took a look into my gentoo installation. The ebuild have no patch for that, If into a terminal I run:

env SHELL=/bin/sh mc

it just start. But

ls -l /bin/sh

show me that it is a symlink to bash.

Sorry for the noise, I will report it upstream.
